basic_details.job_title: HAL Koraput Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Training & Development Institute, Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Koraput Division, Sunabeda, Koraput, Odisha – 763002
basic_details.application_mode: Physical / By Post (Ordinary / Speed / Registered) to Chief Manager (Training), HAL Koraput Division
basic_details.short_information: HAL Koraput Division is recruiting NAPS Trade Apprentices (Ex-ITI) in 8 trades for 2026-27 from candidates who have passed 10th and ITI (CTS) from recognized institutes in Odisha state only, last date 30 June 2026.

important_dates.document verification / joining: Shortlisted candidates will be informed through email

age_limit.age_details: Apprenticeship Training under NAPS (National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme) – NOT employment

qualification.details: criteria: Details | prior apprenticeship: Candidates who have already undergone, are currently undergoing, or are already registered under a NAPS contract under the Apprenticeship Act elsewhere are NOT eligible. | naps portal registration: Candidates must register as "Candidate" on the NAPS apprenticeship portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) and complete their profile to 100% before applying. Name, Gender, and Date of Birth on the NAPS portal must match exactly with the 10th/HSC/SSC Certificate.
qualification.education_qualification: Must have passed regular and full-time 10th / HSC / SSC AND ITI under Craftsman Training Scheme (CTS) in the relevant trade from a recognized institute. Both qualifications must be from Odisha state only.
qualification.domicile: Odisha state only - 10th and ITI from a recognized institute in Odisha
qualification.experience: Candidates with work experience of 1 year or more are NOT eligible.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 9,600/- or Rs. 10,560/- per month (trade-wise, as per Apprenticeship Amendment Rules 2025)
salary_details.monthly stipend: Rs. 9,600/- or Rs. 10,560/- per month (trade-wise, as per Apprenticeship Amendment Rules 2025)
salary_details.subsidised lunch: Apprentices may avail subsidised lunch inside factory premises on working days
salary_details.hostel facility: Hostel will be provided to selected candidates subject to availability
salary_details.details: Note: After completion of Apprenticeship Training, the Apprenticeship contract will be terminated. HAL has no obligation to offer any employment after training.

selection_process: Selection is merit-based on marks scored by candidates in qualifying examinations. The merit will be calculated using the following weightage:

Reservation will be applied as per the Apprenticeship Act and Government guidelines. Shortlisted candidates will be called through email for document verification and joining. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates attending the selection process. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply in the prescribed application format (as enclosed with the notification). Applications can be submitted physically or by post (ordinary/speed/registered) to the address below. Online application is not available for this recruitment.
Register as "Candidate" on the NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ and complete the profile to 100%. Ensure Name, Gender, and Date of Birth exactly match the 10th certificate.
Fill the application form in the prescribed format, mentioning marks obtained in educational qualifications clearly. Clearly mention the category (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD) if seeking reservation.

Attach the following enclosures: (a) Copy of 10th/HSC/SSC Mark Sheet; (b) ITI NCVT Certificate; (c) Consolidated Mark Sheet (all years/semesters); (d) Caste Certificate (for SC/ST/OBC candidates); (e) EWS Certificate (if applicable); (f) Disability Certificate (for PwBD – minimum 40% disability).
Write "NAPS APPLICATION" on top of the envelope.
Send the application by post (ordinary/speed/registered) or submit physically to:
Chief Manager (Training) Training & Development Institute Hindustan Aeronautics Limited Koraput Division, PO: Sunabeda Dist: Koraput, Odisha – 763003
Last date for receiving applications: 30-06-2026. All correspondences will be made through the email ID provided by the candidate in the application form.
important_instructions: This is an Apprenticeship Training engagement under NAPS - it is NOT employment. After completion of the Apprenticeship contract, HAL has no obligation to offer any employment. Only candidates from Odisha state (10th and ITI from Odisha) are eligible. Applications from other states will not be considered. Candidates must register on the NAPS portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) and complete their profile to 100% before applying. Profile details must match the 10th certificate exactly. Candidates already undergoing or registered under any NAPS contract elsewhere, or with 1 year or more of work experience, are not eligible. Selection is based entirely on merit - 70% weightage to 10th marks and 30% to ITI marks; no written test or interview is conducted. Shortlisted candidates will be informed through email only. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the selection process or document verification. The envelope containing the application must have "NAPS APPLICATION" written on top. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. Hostel facility is subject to availability; subsidised lunch is available inside factory premises on working days. PwBD candidates must have a minimum 40% benchmark disability to be eligible for PwBD reservation and age relaxation.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download HAL Koraput NAPS Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download HAL Koraput NAPS Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. hat is the last date to apply for HAL Koraput Division NAPS Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications is 30-06-2026. Applications must reach the Training & Development Institute, HAL Koraput Division by this date either physically or by post.

faq.question: Q2. What trades are available for HAL Koraput NAPS Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Eight trades are available: Fitter, Turner, Machinist, Electrician, Welder (Gas & Electric), Programming and System Administration Assistant (PASAA), Foundry Man, and Forger & Heat Treater.

faq.question: Q3. Is this apprenticeship open to candidates from all states?
faq.answer: No. Only candidates who have passed 10th/SSC and ITI (CTS) from a recognized institute in Odisha state are eligible. Candidates from other states are not eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for HAL Koraput NAPS Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for General candidates is 23 years as on 30-06-2026. OBC candidates get 3 years' relaxation (26 years), SC/ST candidates get 5 years' relaxation (28 years), and PwD candidates get 10 years' relaxation (33 years).

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend for HAL Koraput NAPS Apprentices?
faq.answer: The monthly stipend is Rs. 9,600/- or Rs. 10,560/- depending on the trade, as per Apprenticeship (Amendment) Rules 2025. Additionally, subsidised lunch is available inside the factory premises on working days, and hostel facility is provided subject to availability.

faq.question: Q6. How is selection done for HAL Koraput NAPS Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Selection is purely merit-based on qualifying examination marks - 70% weightage to 10th grade marks and 30% weightage to ITI marks. There is no written test or interview. Reservation is applied as per the Apprenticeship Act and Government guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. Is NAPS portal registration mandatory for HAL Koraput Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must register as "Candidate" on the NAPS apprenticeship portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) and complete their profile to 100% before applying. Name, Gender, and Date of Birth on the NAPS portal must match exactly with the 10th certificate.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with prior apprenticeship or work experience apply?
faq.answer: No. Candidates who have already undergone, are currently undergoing, or are already registered under a NAPS contract elsewhere are not eligible. Candidates with work experience of 1 year or more are also not eligible.

faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications is 30-06-2026. Applications must reach the Training & Development Institute, HAL Koraput Division by this date either physically or by post.
